prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2GR-FSE (3.5L V6 direct-injection, 310hp stock) with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, and a Tomei 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with a custom 3-inch downpipe bypassing the factory catalytic converters for optimized spool and flow

Full bolt-on reinforcement with a TRD-sourced 2GR-FSE reinforced block, ARP head studs, and a custom 1000cc ID1000 fuel injectors paired with a Walbro 450LPH fuel pump and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup to manage boost pressures up to 18psi

Chassis-specific suspension overhaul using Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom valving for the Blade’s 2800mm wheelbase, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars, and a Whiteline front strut tower brace to eliminate flex under hard cornering
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (specific to the Blade’s JDM E150 chassis) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler for aggressive stance and aero balance

Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with a subtle JDM-inspired 'Blade Master' script on the rear quarter panels, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) in a gunmetal finish with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)

Interior retrofit with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JDM-spec, bolt-in for the Blade’s mounting points), a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a full custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries with a 6-point harness bar for track readiness
